entry_id: Note: Xero extract of the family cultural fund contributions routed through the fund into the Ridgewood equity workstream and its partner network. Confirmed by column shows the family accountant sign off. Routing from column identifies whether the contribution originated in the family fund the Mexican Cultural Society of Toronto or an anonymous benefactor. These contributions are outside the district budget lines and are not captured in the school ledger. The family accountant reconciles the fund quarterly and produces a summary before each tax cycle.
